title: S + will be + p.p.（未來被動）

formulas.zh: 主詞＋未來式＋被動語態，表示未來將被執行的動作

formulas.formula: S + is/are going to be + p.p.
formulas.zh: 主詞＋近未來式＋被動語態，表示即將被執行的動作
情態動詞＋被動語態，表示能夠、應該、必須被執行的動作

explanation: 未來式被動語態用於描述將來會被執行的動作。構造方式為：助動詞(will/is/are going to/can/should/must) + be + 過去分詞。使用時機包括：陳述未來的計畫、預測或義務。需注意主詞為動作的承受者而非執行者。常見錯誤是混淆主被動或時態選擇，應根據語境判斷是確定未來(will be)或即將發生(is going to be)。情態動詞被動需保持情態詞之後接be。

examples.eng: The new stadium will be built next year in this city.
examples.chi: 新運動場將在明年於本城市興建。

examples.eng: The project is going to be completed by the team next month.
examples.chi: 該專案將於下月由團隊完成。

examples.eng: The documents must be submitted before the deadline.
examples.chi: 文件必須在截止期限前提交。

examples.eng: The conference should be held in a larger venue for more attendees.
examples.chi: 為了容納更多參與者，會議應該在更大的場地舉行。

extension.tip: 判斷被動語態的關鍵：主詞是否為動作的承受者。「未來式被動」強調時間在未來，「情態動詞被動」強調可能性或義務。注意：is being done 為現在進行被動(動作進行中)，不同於 will be done(未來純被動)。避免主被動混淆，檢查主詞與動詞關係。

examples.test: The house will paint next week. ✗
examples.result: → The house will be painted next week. ✓(主詞house是被動作的，需加be)

examples.test: They are going to build a bridge. (主動)
examples.result: → A bridge is going to be built by them. (被動，主詞轉為承受者)

examples.test: The report must hand in tomorrow. ✗
examples.result: → The report must be handed in tomorrow. ✓(情態動詞後接be+p.p.)

extension.note: 未來被動：助動詞+be+過去分詞；情態動詞被動：情態詞+be+過去分詞；主詞判斷為先，動作承受者用被動。

exercises.sentence: The exam will be held on Friday next week.
exercises.translation: 考試將在下週星期五舉行。

parts: by the board of directors very soon.
exercises.sentence: This important decision is going to be made by the board of directors very soon.
exercises.translation: 這個重要決定將很快由董事會做出。

parts: to attend the orientation program tomorrow.
exercises.sentence: All students must be required to attend the orientation program tomorrow.
exercises.translation: 所有學生必須參加明天的新生說明會。

parts: and replaced with new ones by next month.
exercises.sentence: The damaged equipment will be repaired and replaced with new ones by next month.
exercises.translation: 損壞的設備將在下月前被修理並更換為新的。
